psv-core.description: Core PSV engineering calculation expert. Analyzes liquid_relief, gas_relief, two_phase, fire_scenarios, thermal_expansion, thermo_props, valve_selection, validation, unit_converter, constants, blowby, vendor_catalog modules. Validates API 520/521 formula correctness, unit conversions, edge cases, and numerical robustness.

psv-desktop.description: Desktop application (PyQt5) expert. Analyzes app.py, tabs.py, tabs_extra.py, workers.py, auth.py, report_generator.py, graph_window.py, vendor_window.py. Focuses on UI thread safety, signal/slot correctness, auth flow, save/load logic, and PyInstaller build integrity.

psv-auditor.description: Security and code quality auditor for PSV Sizing Suite. Finds auth vulnerabilities, XSS, dead code, duplication, missing validation, brittle tests, hardcoded secrets, build issues, and documentation gaps. Produces structured severity-ranked reports.
